title: Common Design Metaphors for Human-Centred AI
description: A visual comparison of different metaphors used to conceptualize and design AI systems, highlighting their core concepts and implications for the human-AI relationship.
relationships: Continuum from AI-centric (Oracle/Agent) to Human-centric (Tool/Partner) to Co-creative (Material)
Illustrates varying levels of user control, agency, and collaboration inherent in each metaphor.
